c74object.name: dk.regressor
c74object.digest: Output parameter regression based on new input
c74object.description: The dk.regressor object will create parameter regression based on a pre-trained regressor model.
c74object.discussion:
If you want to learn more about the underlying algorithm have a look at this article:
https://learn.flucoma.org/reference/mlpregressor

inlet.description: Takes incoming buffer~ name to find the nearest class match. Also takes the messages for object control.

outlet.description: The nearest match in the pre-trained classifier.
Dict output for displaying on an dk.plotter.

objarg.name: default
objarg.digest: JSON file to load by default
objarg.description: JSON file to load by default.

method.name: dump
method.digest: Dumps regressor summary out the right-most outlet
method.description: Dumps regressor summary out the right-most outlet.

method.name: info
method.digest: Print regressor metatdata/info to Max console
method.description: Prints a summary of the regressor metatdata/info to the Max console.

method.name: read
method.description: Reads a pre-trained regressor directly from a relative or absolute path. With no additional argument, a file dialog will appear to choose a .json file.

attribute.name: outputmode
attribute.digest: Sets how the output values are returned
attribute.description:
Sets how the output values are returned. The available options are:
iterated = sends out pairs formatted as key-value pairs for sending directly to a synth algorithm (e.g. param1 0.0, param2, 0.5, param3, 1.0)
lacedlist = single list with all the key-value pairs combined into a single laced list (e.g. param1 0.0 param2 0.5 param3 1.0)
rawlist = single list with only the values (e.g. 0.0 0.5 1.0)
